action.reasoning: Observation: 20 epochs with focal loss + strong augmentation gave val_ba=0.8620 on source domains. Previous 5-epoch model got test=0.6199. Need to submit current model to measure improvement. The train/val loss gap (0.13 vs 0.82) shows overfitting to source domains. Analysis: The model needs better domain generalization. Key strategies: (1) Submit current checkpoint to measure progress, (2) Try CLIP backbone which has better zero-shot generalization, (3) Use backbone fine-tuning with lower LR, (4) More aggressive TTA. Decision: Submit current best checkpoint, then try CLIP ViT-B/16 backbone which was pre-trained on diverse internet images and may generalize better to new camera trap locations.
